differential_diagnoses: Psoriatic erythroderma with secondary cutaneous herpes simplex infection
DRESS syndrome (Drug Reaction with Eosinophilia and Systemic Symptoms)
next_steps: Excisional biopsy of an enlarged inguinal or axillary lymph node for histopathology, immunohistochemistry, and T-cell receptor gene rearrangement studies
Peripheral blood flow cytometry for T-cell markers and identification of Sézary cells
Peripheral blood T-cell receptor (TCR) gene rearrangement studies
Computed tomography-guided biopsy of the pulmonary mass
Human T-cell lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) serology
